media.name: Mineral salts medium (MM) + quadruple carbon sources, C=4 (SuperCC GSMM simulation) (PMC12858907)
media.base_medium_reference: Supplementary Information / Supplementary Methods of the source paper itself: 'Potentiators empower synthetic microbiomes as silent guardians against co-contamination', Nature Communications (2025), DOI 10.1038/s41467-025-67953-5; PMC12858907. The MM recipe is defined verbatim in the Supplementary Methods (Media section).
media.verification_evidence: MM with 25 mmol/gDW each of glucose, citrate, acetate, and fumarate (quadruple carbon sources, C = 4). ... Except for the essential nitrogen source (NH4+) which was set to 100 mmol/gDW, the contents of all other inorganic substances without carbon (C) or nitrogen (N) were set to 1000 mmol/gDW.
media.citation: Ruan et al. Potentiators empower synthetic microbiomes as silent guardians against co-contamination. Nature Communications (2025). DOI: 10.1038/s41467-025-67953-5. [PMC12858907]
